summary: Tested all new features: admin user detail page, college report system, admin reports tab with respond flow, notification bell. Fixed a critical App.js syntax bug where AppLayout function declaration was missing. All 14 backend tests pass. Full E2E flow verified end-to-end.

issues: College header image shows a generic basketball/athlete photo that appears to be a stock image of a female basketball player, which may not match all college page contexts — low priority cosmetic note

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: App.js was missing the `function AppLayout({ children })` declaration at line 139. The function body (useState, useLocation, return JSX) was floating outside any function, causing a Babel SyntaxError: 'return' outside of function. This crashed the entire React app with a compile error. Fix: added `function AppLayout({ children }) {` between the NotificationBell closing brace and the state declarations.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@courtbound.com / admin123 | Player: used test_session token for user_test123 (player@test.com)
seed_data_creation: Created a test session token for user_test123 in user_sessions collection. Submitted 2 test college reports for Duke University (coach_name=Test Coach, issue_type=Wrong email address). Admin responded to one report. These reports remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features fully working: (1) Admin 3-tab dashboard (Overview/Users/Reports) ✓ (2) Users tab View button navigates to /admin/users/:userId ✓ (3) User detail page shows profile card, 5 stat pills (Emails Sent, Replies Received, Reply Rate, Colleges Tracked, Positive Outcomes), Copy Promo Summary btn, Activity Timeline tab, All Colleges tab ✓ (4) College detail page has flag buttons on coach cards ✓ (5) Report modal with issue type dropdown, correct info, notes, submit → success state ✓ (6) Admin Reports tab shows submitted reports with college/coach/user info and Respond button ✓ (7) Admin inline respond form with status buttons (investigating/fixed/invalid) and message textarea ✓ (8) Notification bell shows red unread indicator when admin responds with a message ✓ (9) Clicking bell shows dropdown with admin message and Status: fixed ✓. One CRITICAL BUG WAS FIXED: App.js AppLayout function declaration was missing, causing compile error. Fix applied.

rca_of_issue.issue: React app showed compile error: SyntaxError: 'return' outside of function (App.js line 142)
rca_of_issue.root_cause: The AppLayout function's opening declaration `function AppLayout({ children }) {` was missing. The function body with useState hooks and the JSX return statement were floating at module scope, which is invalid JavaScript syntax. Babel detected the `return` statement outside any function and threw a SyntaxError, preventing the entire app from compiling.
rca_of_issue.fix: Added `function AppLayout({ children }) {` between the closing brace of NotificationBell (line 136) and the `const [mobileOpen...]` line (line 139) in /app/frontend/src/App.js
